free_text: intervals. Superconducting solenoids used to precess
the spin polarization so as to have on target any one
of the 3 spin states, normal (N), sideways (S), and
plastic scintillators used as analyzers. Downstream
from the center of the front 4 scintillators is an
azimuthically symmetric ring of 12 large BC-400
plastic scintillators, which detect neutrons scattered
perpendicular to neutron flux, used to measure neutron
polarization. First 3 planes are Bicron BC-517S liquid
scintillator tanks; fourth consists of 10 BC-408
plastic scintillators. Front 2 scintillators are used
as neutron polarization analizers. Thin plastic
scintillators located in front of planes are used to
Spectra fit using line-shape fitting code ALLFIT.
Corrected for contribution of 12C in target.
Data received by email from J. Rapaport,
OS. Major changes in sub.2; REL-REF added
Data originally given in units mb/sr/100 keV.
Absolute uncertainties include also a 7% uncertainty
due to uncertainty in target thickness, enrichment of
REACTION and data units changed, minor
